title: Recent Projects
subtitle: Explore our latest community initiatives and activities

projects.name: Coastal Cleanup 2026
projects.description: A massive district-wide initiative to clean up the western coastlines. Over 500 volunteers participated to collect plastic waste and restore the natural habitat of endangered sea turtles and local wildlife.

projects.name: Youth Leadership Summit
projects.description: An intensive 3-day workshop focused on developing the next generation of community leaders. Topics included public speaking, project management, and sustainable development.

projects.name: Vision for All
projects.description: A free eye-care clinic setup in rural areas providing free checkups and spectacles to over 1000 elderly citizens who lacked access to basic medical facilities.
